tools.name: cix
tools.description: Package manager for cognitive extensions. Discovers, installs, and manages Claude Code extensions from marketplace repositories.

tools.name: memex
tools.description: Extended memory for you and your agents. Excavates and connects historical human-AI collaboration artifacts across heterogeneous sources.

tools.name: ix
tools.description: Intelligent experimentation. Multi-agent system for running structured experiments with provenance and reproducibility.

tools.name: matrix
tools.description: Agent runtime platform. DAG orchestration, storage, configuration, and dependency injection for multi-agent systems.

tools.name: recon
tools.description: Heterogeneous sources in, structured data out. Fetch from APIs, CLIs, and web pages; reshape to uniform JSONL queryable with SQL. Extends Claude's effective context through structured indirection.
